expectations.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses '### Code review' header (not '## PR Review'). No '**Target:**' metadata line. No verdict section. Simple format listing 1 issue plus sub-threshold findings.

expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
expectations.evidence: No mention of target branch, v18/dev, or any branch information anywhere in the 16-line review.

expectations.text: Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default webhook payload type from the current default to 'Minimal'
expectations.evidence: The review focuses only on a stale XML doc remark. It does not discuss the behavioral impact of changing the default from Legacy to Minimal, the effect on existing installations, or the implications for webhook consumers.

expectations.text: Review output is under 150 lines — proportionate to the tiny 3-file, 25-line change
expectations.evidence: Review is 16 lines, well under the 150-line threshold.
